_description: Template for env vars extracted from vault guidelines. Claude reads guideline files and fills in the values. Do NOT copy this template as-is — extract fresh values from the actual guideline documents.

REQUIRED_FIELDS_JSON._source: 00. Core Guideline §1.1 Core Required Fields table, column 1 (backtick field names)

DEPRECATED_KEYS_JSON._source: 00. Core Guideline §1.3 Deprecated Keys table, column 1 (backtick key names)

ALLOWED_STATUS_JSON._source: 00. Core Guideline §1.4 Status Values table, column 1 (backtick values)

STATUS_REQUIRED_TYPES_JSON._source: 00. Core Guideline §1.4, line starting with '**필수 유형**' — backtick-wrapped types

ALLOWED_TYPES_JSON._source: 01. Frontmatter Guideline §1 Type Map table, column 1 (backtick type values)

TYPE_TAG_MAP_JSON._source: 01. Frontmatter Guideline §1 Type Map — References category types mapped to reference/{type}

FOLDER_TYPE_RULES_JSON._source: 01. Frontmatter Guideline Caveats §1 — 3-rule decision tree for project/area/archive folders
FOLDER_TYPE_RULES_JSON._format: JSON object with fields: folders, index_type, date_prefix_type, default_type, suffix_overrides
